_comment: Tracked experimental variable for routerescalation: which concrete model sits at each killhouse tier. No secrets here: api_key_env NAMES the env var holding the token; the token stays in your environment. Fill the three model ids with real Fireworks ids (see https://fireworks.ai/models). bin/run_bracket.py reads this by importing killhouse_gate_replay and calling load_routing() on this repo root.
